summary_text: **Pre-implementation simulation (Lane 4)** Goal is feasible, but not yet draft-ready until the required grounding steps are complete. I will treat this as a blocked pre-draft state with explicit evidence requirements. 1. Scope freeze checklist (before any draft text) - Confirm target audience and deployment context: `開発チーム向け`, `経営層向け`, or `利用者向け`. - Confirm required depth: `実装ガイド（技術設定中心）` vs `意思決定ガイド（設計判断中心）`. - Confirm legal/compliance posture: whether this is a general guidance note or includes regulated operations (個人情報, 金融, 医療, インシデント通報). - Confirm tone and structure: note default thesis-first with short sections and explicit risk prioritization. 2. Required sources before writing - Primary sources only for claims, ordered by priority: - 技術仕様・ベンダ公式ガイド（モデル安全/アクセス制御/監査） - 試験系ガイド（実装境界、ロールベース権限制御、暗号化、監査証跡） - 法令・ガイドラインの該当条項（適用範囲があれば） - For each source, extract only direct quotes for key claims first, then infer/translate into Japanese prose. - Store each quote with timestamp and source ID in a fact ledger. 3. Claim/validation strategy - Build a claim ledger before narrative drafting: - `claim_id`, `claim_type`（技術要件/リスク/対策）, `source_quote`, `source`, `accessed_at`, `inference_or_fact`, `confidence`. - Validation order (hard gates): - fact ledger complete - claim-source trace check (every fact-bearing sentence mapped) - legal stop-condition check (`法的判断` が必要かどうか) - risk/ambiguity review (欠落・矛盾・時限性の明示) - For this topic, likely risk-heavy sections: prompt injection 対策, データガバナンス, モデル更新時の追跡可能性, 人的監査の失敗モード. 4. Receipt/visibility strategy for this run - Keep the run evidence authoritative and machine-checked: - `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_RECEIPT_DIR=/Users/masayuki/.config/kernel/bootstrap-receipts` - `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_ACTIVE_MODELS_CSV="codex,glm,gemini-cli"` - `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_MANIFEST_LANE_COUNT=6` - `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_AGENT_LABELS=true` - `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_SUBAGENT_LABELS=true` - Write/refresh receipt via `bash scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh write <lane_count> <providers_csv> <normal|degraded-allowed>`. - Refresh receipt any time mode/active lane evidence changes, then log a compact evidence marker for pre-draft state. - Continue with no draft publication until checks pass and both `claim-source` and `legal stop-condition` gates are explicit and green. Changed files: none.
